note_en: Predictions are my (Fable 5) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. 1X2 odds from DraftKings/bet365/FanDuel (16-19 Jul); score odds are market-derived estimates. Scratch a panel to reveal my exact score call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Fable 5）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。胜平负赔率来源：DraftKings/bet365/FanDuel（7 月 16-19 日）；比分赔率为市场推算估值。刮开面板揭晓我的精准比分预测。

record.note_en: Match-outcome calls scored from Matchday 3 onward, continuing through the knockout rounds. Updated daily. ⭐ = exact scoreline. ✓ = correct outcome.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮起对预测胜负计分，并延续至淘汰赛阶段，每日更新。⭐ = 比分全中，✓ = 结果正确。

log.label_zh: 瑞士 0-0 哥伦比亚（点球 4-3 瑞士胜）
西班牙 1-0 阿根廷（加时）

champions.reason_en: Spain are 2026 World Cup champions, beating Argentina 1-0 in extra time in the final (July 19, East Rutherford, NJ). Ferran Torres struck 39 seconds into the second period of extra time, with Argentina reduced to 10 men after Enzo Fernández's second yellow card in second-half stoppage time. It's Spain's second world title, their first since 2010; Messi was held scoreless in his self-declared final World Cup match.
champions.reason_zh: 西班牙夺得2026年世界杯冠军，决赛加时1-0淘汰阿根廷（7 月 19 日，新泽西东卢瑟福）。加时赛下半场开始仅39秒，费兰·托雷斯打入制胜球；此前恩佐·费尔南德斯在下半场补时阶段第二黄变一红被罚下，阿根廷少打一人。这是西班牙队史第二座世界杯冠军，也是2010年以来的首次夺冠；梅西在他自称的谢幕之战中颗粒无收。

players.name: Rodri
players.reason_en: Named the tournament's Golden Ball winner as best player, capping a run from midfield anchor to champion — his semi-final masterclass against France and control through the knockout rounds culminated in Spain's 1-0 extra-time win over Argentina in the final, edging out Messi for the award.
players.reason_zh: 罗德里荣膺本届金球奖，当选世界杯最佳球员——从半决赛淘汰法国一战的中场大师级表现，到淘汰赛阶段持续的中场掌控，最终率队在决赛加时1-0淘汰阿根廷夺冠，力压梅西摘得金球奖。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Won the World Cup Golden Boot with 10 goals, becoming the first player to win the award at two different World Cups (2022 and 2026). He finished two goals clear of Messi, who was held scoreless in the final as Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in extra time.
players.reason_zh: 姆巴佩以10球荣膺本届世界杯金靴奖，成为首位两次（2022年、2026年）问鼎世界杯金靴的球员。他以两球优势力压梅西——后者在决赛中颗粒无收，西班牙最终加时1-0淘汰阿根廷夺冠。

matches.reason_en: R32 winners Paraguay (pens Germany) vs France (3-0 Sweden). Paraguay showed resolve to beat Germany on pens but France's 3-0 demolition of Sweden shows they're in a different gear. Mbappé and Dembélé will be too much. France advance comfortably.
matches.reason_zh: 32 强胜者巴拉圭（点球淘汰德国）对法国（3-0 瑞典）。巴拉圭凭韧性点球淘汰德国，但法国 3-0 横扫瑞典证明其已进入另一个层次。姆巴佩与登贝莱将是决定性因素。法国轻松晋级。

matches.reason_en: R32 winners Canada (1-0 South Africa) vs Morocco (pens Netherlands). Morocco are defensively superb and a genuine dark horse, but Canada's North-American home-continent edge and clinical counter-punch give them a narrow advantage. Tight low-scoring affair.
matches.reason_zh: 32 强胜者加拿大（1-0 南非）对摩洛哥（点球淘汰荷兰）。摩洛哥防守出色，是真正的黑马，但加拿大北美主场优势与高效反击令其窄幅领先。预计低分胶着对决。

matches.reason_en: Euro 2016 final rematch, Ronaldo vs Yamal generational clash. Spain's 3-0 demolition of Austria was the most complete display of the round, with a clean sheet the whole group stage; Portugal needed a 94th-minute Ramos header to survive Croatia. Spain's collective press and control should edge an individually gifted but less cohesive Portugal side.
matches.reason_zh: 欧洲杯 2016 决赛重演，C 罗对阵世代新星亚马尔。西班牙 3-0 横扫奥地利是本轮最完整的表现，小组赛全程零失球；葡萄牙则靠拉莫斯 94 分钟头球险胜克罗地亚。西班牙的整体压迫与控场能力应险胜个人能力出众但整体性稍逊的葡萄牙。

matches.reason_en: Second Round of 16 meeting between these sides in the last four World Cups — Belgium won 2-1 (AET) back in 2014. Folarin Balogun's return has tightened the market and shifted some odds toward the hosts, but Belgium's front three and battle-tested spine still carry a touch more individual quality. Lumen Field's raucous crowd is the USA's best equalizer.
matches.reason_zh: 两队本届是近四届世界杯内第二次在16强相遇——2014年比利时加时2-1获胜。巴洛贡伤愈回归令盘口收窄、部分赔率略偏向东道主，但比利时锋线组合与历经考验的后防线个人能力仍略胜一筹。西雅图主场声浪是美国最大依仗。

matches.reason_en: R32 winners Brazil (2-1 Japan, Martinelli) vs Norway (2-1 Ivory Coast, Haaland's record-breaking run). Brazil's superior overall quality and squad depth should edge a knockout thriller, but Haaland remains the tournament's biggest X-factor — expect goals at both ends.
matches.reason_zh: 32 强胜者巴西（2-1 胜日本，马丁内利建功）对挪威（2-1 胜科特迪瓦，哈兰德连破纪录）。巴西整体实力与阵容深度更胜一筹，但哈兰德仍是本届杯赛最大变数——预计双方都有进球。

matches.reason_en: R32 winners Mexico (2-0 Ecuador, yet to concede) vs England (2-1 DR Congo, Kane brace). Estadio Azteca is a fortress — co-hosts have lost there only twice competitively in 56 years — but England's greater individual quality and Kane's current form should be enough to survive a hostile, high-altitude test.
matches.reason_zh: 32 强胜者墨西哥（2-0 胜厄瓜多尔，本届尚未失球）对英格兰（2-1 胜刚果（金），凯恩梅开二度）。阿兹特克球场固若金汤——东道主在此 56 年间仅两次联赛级失利——但英格兰更强的个人能力与凯恩的状态应足以扛过高原与主场氛围的考验。

matches.reason_en: First-ever World Cup meeting between these sides. Argentina's group-stage dominance (9 pts, +7 GD) outweighs the extra-time scare against Cape Verde — Messi, in what he's signalled is his final World Cup, remains locked in with goals in every match. Egypt's historic run (first Round of 16 since 1934) leans on Salah's brilliance and defensive discipline, but the class gap with the reigning champions is significant. Argentina to progress toward a mouth-watering quarter-final with the Switzerland/Colombia winner.
matches.reason_zh: 两队世界杯历史首次交手。阿根廷小组赛的统治级表现（9分，净胜球+7）足以弥补对佛得角加时赛的惊魂一刻——梅西在自己宣布的谢幕之战中已场场进球，状态正佳。埃及历史性晋级16强（自1934年以来首次）将依靠萨拉赫的个人能力与防守纪律，但与卫冕冠军的实力差距明显。阿根廷有望晋级，八强将迎来瑞士/哥伦比亚胜者的诱人对决。

matches.reason_en: Only the second World Cup meeting ever between these sides. Both arrive unbeaten in 90 minutes this tournament — Switzerland edged Algeria 2-0, Colombia ground out Ghana 1-0. Díaz and Rodríguez give Colombia's attack a sharper cutting edge than Switzerland's efficient but less explosive setup. Winner gets a quarter-final against Argentina or Egypt.
matches.reason_zh: 两队世界杯历史上第二次交手。双方本届常规时间均未尝败绩——瑞士2-0胜阿尔及利亚，哥伦比亚1-0险胜加纳。迪亚斯与罗德里格斯让哥伦比亚的攻击线比高效但缺乏爆发力的瑞士更具威胁。胜者将晋级八强战阿根廷或埃及。
matches.label_zh: 瑞士 0-0 哥伦比亚（点球 4-3 瑞士胜）

matches.reason_en: First of the quarter-finals to kick off. France ground past Paraguay 1-0 on a Mbappé penalty, while Morocco thumped Canada 3-0 to reach a second straight WC quarter-final. France's greater squad depth and knockout pedigree make them clear favourites, but Morocco's disciplined defensive block and dark-horse run mean this won't be routine.
matches.reason_zh: 首场八强战。法国靠姆巴佩点球 1-0 险胜巴拉圭，摩洛哥则 3-0 大胜加拿大，连续两届杀入八强。法国阵容深度与淘汰赛经验更胜一筹，稳居热门，但摩洛哥防守纪律严明且延续黑马之势，此役绝非轻松过关。

matches.reason_en: Spain haven't conceded all tournament and needed a 91st-minute Merino winner to see off Portugal; Belgium arrive full of confidence after blitzing the USA 4-1 with De Ketelaere leading the line. Spain's control and Yamal's form give them the edge — and with France already waiting in the July 14 semi, the winner gets the tournament's toughest remaining assignment.
matches.reason_zh: 西班牙本届赛事尚未失球，但也要靠梅里诺第 91 分钟绝杀才险胜葡萄牙；比利时以德凯特莱雷领衔 4-1 血洗美国，士气正盛。西班牙的控场能力与亚马尔的状态占优——而法国已在 7 月 14 日的半决赛等候，胜者将迎来本届最艰难的对手。

matches.reason_en: England have their spine back — Rice recovered from illness and Guéhi from a hamstring strain to start, though Quansah is suspended after his R16 red card and Henderson is out for the tournament with a broken wrist. Norway say a stomach bug that hit the squad this week has cleared. Market (DraftKings) has England -110 to win outright, roughly a coin flip with the draw. Haaland's pace (7 goals, tied for the Golden Boot lead) makes this the toughest defensive test England have faced, but their squad depth should be enough in a tight one.
matches.reason_zh: 英格兰核心回归——赖斯病愈复出，格伊也从16强战腿筋拉伤中伤愈回归首发，但昆萨16强红牌停赛一场，亨德森因腕骨骨折缺席本届余下赛事。挪威方面称本周困扰球队的肠胃疾病已痊愈。市场（DraftKings）英格兰主胜赔率-110，与战平几乎五五开。哈兰德的速度（7球，并列金靴榜首）将是英格兰本届遇到的最强攻击考验，但阵容深度应能助其惊险取胜。

matches.reason_en: Argentina go in fully fit — Scaloni has no fresh injury concerns, and Romero (calf scare vs Egypt) has been passed fit to start. Switzerland are further weakened after already grinding through 120 goalless minutes against Colombia: Johan Manzambi is out with a training-ground knee injury, and midfielder Michel Aebischer and defender Luca Jaquez are also unavailable. DraftKings has Argentina -145 (roughly 56% implied) to win outright. With Messi in the form of his life and Switzerland's options thinning, the champions should have enough.
matches.reason_zh: 阿根廷阵容齐整——斯卡洛尼没有新增伤病，罗梅罗（对阵埃及一战曾有小腿伤情）已通过体检确认可以首发。瑞士方面雪上加霜，此前已与哥伦比亚鏖战120分钟未进球：曼赞比因训练中膝伤缺席，中场艾比舍尔和后卫哈克斯同样无法出战。DraftKings赔率阿根廷主胜-145（隐含胜率约56%）。梅西状态正佳，瑞士可用之兵日渐稀薄，卫冕冠军应有足够把握过关。

matches.reason_en: DraftKings has France favourites on the 90-minute line (+135) and to advance outright (-145, ~56% fair after devig), with bet365 in line (+130). Aurélien Tchouaméni (thigh) has recovered well in training and now looks likely to start, while Marcus Thuram (calf) remains doubtful and isn't in the projected XI. Mbappé arrives in career-best form, leading the Golden Boot on 8 goals with the tiebreaking edge in assists. Spain conceded for the first time all tournament in the QF win over Belgium, though Yamal is reportedly back to full fitness after a minor knock — his dribbling against France's back line remains the must-watch duel.
matches.reason_zh: DraftKings法国90分钟盘口+135、晋级盘-145（去水后约56%胜率）继续领先，bet365同样力挺法国（+130）。特查梅尼（大腿伤）训练恢复顺利，目前有望首发；图拉姆（小腿伤）仍存疑，不在首发名单内。姆巴佩状态正佳，以8球领跑金靴且助攻数占先。西班牙在八强战对比利时一役中本届首次失球，亚马尔据悉已从轻伤中恢复并重返最佳状态，他对法国防线的单挑仍是本场焦点看点。

matches.reason_en: Spain await in the final after beating France 2-0, raising the stakes further. DraftKings' advance market (14 Jul) has tightened to England -120, Argentina +100 (~54% fair after devig), versus a wider gap earlier in the week. Messi took a facial knock vs Switzerland but played all 120 minutes and starts; Cristian Romero (subbed at half-time of ET) says it was heat/fatigue management, not injury. England's Declan Rice is managing a sickness bug plus hamstring/back and calf niggles but is expected to start; Jordan Henderson is out for the tournament. England's meanest-in-the-field defence (6 conceded in 6) edges a tight, low-scoring semi.
matches.reason_zh: 西班牙已2-0击败法国率先晋级决赛，令本场胜负更为关键。DraftKings晋级盘口（7 月 14 日）已收窄至英格兰-120，阿根廷+100（去水后公平胜率约54%），较周初的差距明显缩小。梅西在对瑞士一役中面部遭碰撞，但打满120分钟且将首发；罗梅罗（加时中场被换下）表示是高温体能管理而非伤病。英格兰赖斯正带伤作战（肠胃不适、腿筋/背部及小腿问题），预计仍将首发；亨德森因手术缺席本届剩余赛事。英格兰本届防线最稳固（6场仅失6球），料将在一场胶着低分战中占优。

matches.reason_en: France go in as -110 favourites (implied ~53%) after their 0-2 semi-final loss to Spain. Mbappé sits level with Messi on 8 Golden Boot goals with Messi playing Sunday's final instead — this is Mbappé's last chance to pull clear, which should keep France's attack sharp even in a dead-rubber fixture.
matches.reason_zh: 法国半决赛0-2不敌西班牙后，在季军战中以-110赔率（隐含概率约53%）领先。姆巴佩金靴榜8球与梅西持平，而梅西周日出战决赛无缘再进球——这是姆巴佩反超的最后机会，即便是荣誉之战，法国的攻击线预计仍会保持锐利。

matches.reason_en: Spain are +125 favourites (FanDuel/DraftKings, 18-19 Jul; Kalshi has them at 58%) riding a 37-match unbeaten streak, with Yamal and Rodri both in career-best form after shutting down Mbappé, Olise and Dembélé in the semi. Argentina have trailed or been level after 90 minutes in all four knockout games yet won every one — 12 of their 19 goals have come after the 75th minute — so a late twist is live. Golden Boot subplot: Mbappé finished on 10 after a brace in the bronze match, so Messi (8) needs multiple goals today to catch him.
matches.reason_zh: 西班牙以37场不败战绩为依托，FanDuel/DraftKings（7 月 18-19 日）赔率+125领先，Kalshi预测胜率58%；亚马尔与罗德里正处于生涯最佳状态，半决赛联手锁死姆巴佩、奥利塞与登贝莱。阿根廷本届淘汰赛四场比赛90分钟内均落后或战平，却全部逆转取胜——19粒进球中有12粒发生在第75分钟之后，因此决赛仍有爆冷可能。金靴悬念：姆巴佩在季军战梅开二度后以10球收官，梅西（8球）今日需梅开多球才能追平。
matches.label_zh: 西班牙 1-0 阿根廷（加时）

championsPreFinal.reason_en: Spain reach a first-ever meeting with Argentina in the World Cup final (July 19, East Rutherford, NJ) after beating France 2-0 in the semi. Devigged title odds (DraftKings -160, bet365 -175, 15-16 Jul) make them clear favourites over Argentina (+125 both books) to complete their run and land a second world title.
championsPreFinal.reason_zh: 西班牙2-0淘汰法国后晋级决赛，将与阿根廷历史上首次在世界杯决赛交手（7 月 19 日，新泽西东卢瑟福）。夺冠赔率（DraftKings -160，bet365 -175，7 月 15-16 日，去水后）显示西班牙明显领先阿根廷（两家平台均为+125），是夺得队史第二座世界杯冠军的头号热门。

championsPreFinal.reason_en: Argentina reached the final with a dramatic 2-1 comeback over England — Enzo Fernández's 85th-minute strike and a stoppage-time Lautaro Martínez header (assisted by Messi) overturned Anthony Gordon's opener. The defending champions are underdogs (DraftKings/bet365 +125) against Spain on July 19 but are chasing back-to-back titles, a feat last achieved by Brazil in 1958-62.
championsPreFinal.reason_zh: 阿根廷凭借戏剧性的2-1逆转英格兰晋级决赛——恩佐·费尔南德斯第85分钟远射扳平，补时阶段劳塔罗·马丁内斯头球绝杀（梅西助攻），扭转了戈登的先入一球。卫冕冠军在7 月 19 日对阵西班牙的决赛中处于劣势（DraftKings/bet365 均为+125），但正冲击卫冕——上一次实现此壮举的还是1958-62年的巴西。

playersPreFinal.name: Lionel Messi
playersPreFinal.reason_en: Set up both Argentina goals in the 2-1 semi-final comeback over England (assists for Enzo Fernández and Lautaro Martínez), moving to 8 goals and 4 assists — overtaking Mbappé on the Golden Boot assist tiebreak. Golden Ball odds shortened sharply to around -250 after the display. One game left, his self-declared final World Cup, in the final vs Spain on July 19.
playersPreFinal.reason_zh: 在2-1逆转英格兰的半决赛中为阿根廷两粒进球均送出助攻（分别助攻恩佐·费尔南德斯和劳塔罗·马丁内斯），个人数据升至8球4助攻——凭助攻数反超姆巴佩登顶金靴榜。此役过后金球奖赔率大幅收窄至约-250。他所说的谢幕之战只剩7 月 19 日对阵西班牙的决赛。

playersPreFinal.name: Lamine Yamal
playersPreFinal.reason_en: Spain reached the final with a 2-0 semi-final win over France, Yamal again destabilising a top-tier back line and drawing the foul that led to Oyarzabal's opening penalty. DraftKings has him at roughly +800 for the Golden Ball; a strong final for the tournament favourites would put him firmly in the conversation.
playersPreFinal.reason_zh: 西班牙2-0击败法国晋级决赛，亚马尔再次冲击顶级后防线，并为球队赢得点球（奥亚萨瓦尔主罚破门）。DraftKings金球奖赔率约为+800；若在决赛中延续出色表现，作为夺冠热门的一员，他有望跻身金球奖有力竞争者之列。

playersPreFinal.name: Rodri
playersPreFinal.reason_en: The tournament's biggest Golden Ball mover — his midfield masterclass in Spain's semi-final win over France crashed his odds from around 33/1 to roughly 4/1. Anchoring Spain's control through the knockout rounds, he's now a genuine dark-horse contender heading into the July 19 final.
playersPreFinal.reason_zh: 本届金球奖赔率变动最大的球员——在西班牙淘汰法国的半决赛中送出中场大师级表现，赔率从约33/1骤降至4/1左右。他在淘汰赛阶段持续主导西班牙的中场掌控，如今已是7 月 19 日决赛前一位真正的黑马级竞争者。

playersPreFinal.name: Jude Bellingham
playersPreFinal.reason_en: Scored the 90+8' winner as a substitute in England's wild 6-4 bronze-medal win over France, taking his tournament tally to 7 — a new record for the most goals by an England player at a major tournament. Out of the title race with England already eliminated, so Golden Ball odds remain long (around +3500) despite the milestone.
playersPreFinal.reason_zh: 在英格兰6-4逆转法国的疯狂季军战中，贝林厄姆第90+8分钟替补建功锁定胜局，个人本届进球数升至7球——创下英格兰球员在大赛中的历史进球纪录。由于英格兰已无缘冠军，金球奖赔率虽创纪录仍维持较高（约+3500）。

playersPreFinal.name: Kylian Mbappé
playersPreFinal.reason_en: Scored twice (48', 66') in France's 4-6 bronze-medal loss to England, moving to 10 Golden Boot goals — two clear of Messi (8) with his tournament now over — and becoming the World Cup's all-time leading scorer with 22 career goals. The Golden Boot milestone is huge, but Golden Ball odds remain long since France finished outside the final.
playersPreFinal.reason_zh: 姆巴佩在法国4-6不敌英格兰的季军战中梅开二度（第48、66分钟），本届进球数升至10球——以两球优势领先梅西（8球），且个人本届赛事已结束；同时他以生涯22球超越历史纪录，成为世界杯历史射手王。金靴里程碑意义重大，但由于法国无缘决赛，金球奖赔率仍然偏高。
